section.heading: Registration certificates for marks on principal and supplemental registers to be different

content.p: The certificates of registration for marks registered on the supplemental register shall be conspicuously different from certificates issued for marks registered on the principal register.

note.heading: Repeal and Effect on Existing Rights
note.p: Repeal of inconsistent provisions, effect of this chapter on pending proceedings and existing registrations and rights under prior acts, see notes set out under section 1051 of this title.
